texto: ...in life you have to take lots of decisions and if you don't make decisions you would never do anything because you waste all your time choosing between things you could do...
autor: Mark Gaddon The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night-Time
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mark Gaddon The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night-Time sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “...in life you have to take lots of decisions and if you don't make decisions you would never do …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, inspirational-life, decisions, útil em momentos de inspiracao e reflexao.
